name: Training Wheels Off
description: Sing along with the guide for a few notes, then it goes silent. Can you hold the pitch on your own?

feedback.intro: Sing along with the guide for the first 4 notes. Then it goes quiet — keep going on your own. We'll show you how far you drifted.
feedback.holding: On your own now — trust your ear...
feedback.tip: This is the anti-karaoke exercise. Real singing means holding pitch without a crutch. Even small improvements here transfer to everything.
